title: Monorepo scaffold with pnpm workspaces
description: Create the monorepo skeleton that will host all SystemBook packages, using pnpm workspaces (Turborepo optional but not required for MVP scope).
acceptanceCriteria: `apps/server` exists as an empty TypeScript package with its own `package.json`
`apps/admin` exists as an empty TypeScript package with its own `package.json`
`packages/schema` exists as an empty TypeScript package with its own `package.json`
`packages/preview-kit` exists as an empty TypeScript package with its own `package.json`
`packages/connector` exists as an empty TypeScript package with its own `package.json`
Root `package.json` has workspace-aware scripts: `build`, `dev`, `lint`, `typecheck`, `test` that fan out to workspace packages
`pnpm install` succeeds from repo root with no errors
Root `tsconfig.base.json` exists and each package extends it

steps.details: Run `pnpm init` at repo root. Create `pnpm-workspace.yaml` with `packages: ['apps/*', 'packages/*']`. Set root `package.json` `private: true`.
Create `apps/server/package.json` (name `@systembook/server`) and `apps/admin/package.json` (name `@systembook/admin`), each with a minimal `src/index.ts` placeholder and TypeScript devDependency.
Create each with its own `package.json` (`@systembook/schema`, `@systembook/preview-kit`, `@systembook/connector`), `src/index.ts` placeholder, and `tsconfig.json` extending the root base config.

steps.description: Add root tsconfig.base.json and workspace scripts
steps.details: Create `tsconfig.base.json` with strict mode enabled (`strict: true`, `noUncheckedIndexedAccess: true`). Add root `package.json` scripts using `pnpm -r run <script>` for `build`, `dev`, `lint`, `typecheck`, `test`.
Run `pnpm install` from repo root. Add `@systembook/schema` as a `workspace:*` dependency of `apps/server` and `apps/admin` to confirm workspace linking resolves correctly.

technicalNotes: Turborepo is optional for MVP scope — plain pnpm workspace scripts are sufficient given the small package count; add Turborepo later only if build caching becomes a pain point.
Keep package names scoped under `@systembook/*` for consistency across the monorepo.
